acceptance_criteria.text: PDF, DOCX, and XLSX uploads are extracted into usable agent source text.
proof: Production smoke uploaded PDF/DOCX/XLSX and verified ready extraction methods.

acceptance_criteria.text: Unsupported and empty uploads return readable user-facing errors.
proof: Unit and production smoke verify UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE and EMPTY_FILE.

acceptance_criteria.text: Rich uploaded files appear in the Datahub-lite catalog as connected ready sources.
proof: Production smoke verified connected catalog titles for PDF/DOCX/XLSX.

acceptance_criteria.text: A document agent run over rich files produces a human-readable review journal and useful output.
proof: Production smoke verified input/extraction/output/approval journal kinds and useful output details.

acceptance_criteria.text: Generic document agents do not execute capabilities, dispatch, publish, or send externally.
proof: Production smoke verified no capability step and external_dispatch_performed=false.

acceptance_criteria.text: Production smoke uses temporary data only and verifies fixture cleanup.
proof: Follow-up DB count check found zero smoke users/businesses.

known_gaps: GigaChat SSL warning remains an existing explicit workaround and is outside this Datahub-lite cycle.
